---
title: "historic districts cleaning version 2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# Load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(tidygeocoder)
library(janitor)
library(tidytext)
library(leaflet)
library(lubridate)
library(arcgisgeocode)
```

## Historic Districts

```{r}
# Loading historic landmarks data for historic districts!
historic_landmarks <- read_csv("../data/Historic Districts/Raw/csv_RAW_national-register-listed_20260522.csv") # .. means one folder up
```

```{r}
# Filtering the historic landmarks dataset to make sure that only historic districts are present
historic_districts <- historic_landmarks %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  mutate(listed_date = mdy(listed_date),
         nhl_designated_date = mdy(nhl_designated_date),
         across(where(is.character) & -c(prefix, street_number, external_link, other_names), str_to_title),
         district_name = property_name) %>%
  filter(str_detect(district_name, "Historic District")) %>% 
  mutate(district_name = str_remove(district_name, " Historic District")) %>% 
  mutate(address = paste(property_name, street_number, city, state, sep=", "))
```

```{r}
#\| eval: false
#splitting addresses into groups of 100 for easier geocoding
groups <- split(historic_districts, ceiling(seq_len(nrow(historic_districts)) / 100))

geocoded_groups <- map(groups,~ geocode(.x, address = address, method = "arcgis", lat = latitude, long = longitude))
```

```{r}

new_tibble <- geocoded_groups[[1]]
for(i in 2:length(geocoded_groups)){
  new_tibble <- bind_rows(new_tibble, geocoded_groups[[i]])
}
```

```{r}
write_csv(new_tibble, "historic_districts_clean3_specific_addresses.csv")
```

```{r}
# Adding location

# Have to split because batch limit is 10,000 and there are 12,337
historic_districts_clean <- historic_districts[1:100,] %>% 
  geocode(address, method = 'arcgis', lat = latitude , long = longitude)

```

```{r}
start <- nrow(historic_districts_clean)+1

for(r in start:nrow(historic_districts)){
  temp_row <- historic_districts[r,] %>% 
    geocode(address, method = 'arcgis', lat = latitude , long = longitude)
  
  historic_districts_clean <- rbind(historic_districts_clean, temp_row)
  
  if(r %% 75 == 0){
    Sys.sleep(2)  # pause 2 seconds between batches
    cat("Batch", r, "done\n")  # progress tracking
    #Save progress to disk so you can resume if it crashes partway through:
    write_csv(historic_districts_clean, "geocoded_progress_2.csv")
  }
}
```

```{r}
write_csv(historic_districts_clean[1:12419,], "long_lat_YAY.csv")
```

```{r}
write_csv(historic_districts, "OG_historic_districts_nolatlong.csv")
```

## Historic districts w/o the above!

```{r}
historic_districts_updated <- read_csv("../data/Historic Districts/long_lat_YAY_CORRECT.csv")
```

```{r}
historic_districts_updated[1:100,] <- historic_districts[1:100,] %>% 
  geocode(address, method = 'arcgis', lat = latitude, long = longitude)
```
